target_rules: Preserve the source object name exactly unless the source SQL explicitly renames it.
Do not emit PostgreSQL-only casts, dollar quoting, or language clauses.

unsupported_object_types.sequence: MySQL does not support PostgreSQL-style standalone sequence migration directly in this tool.
unsupported_object_types.cursor: Standalone cursor objects are not supported as migratable objects for MySQL in this tool.
unsupported_object_types.synonym: MySQL does not support synonym objects.

table: Convert PostgreSQL table syntax to valid MySQL DDL with compatible data types and defaults.
view: Convert PostgreSQL view syntax to valid MySQL view syntax.
storedprocedure: Convert PostgreSQL procedure syntax to one valid MySQL CREATE PROCEDURE statement without DELIMITER directives.
function: Convert PostgreSQL function syntax to one valid MySQL CREATE FUNCTION statement.
trigger: Convert PostgreSQL trigger semantics to valid MySQL CREATE TRIGGER syntax when possible.
